description:
his video help you to understand Return to invoice Cover in detail with example. You will be able to understand how you can get the original purchase cost of your car along with registration charges and road tax.  Assessment of loss with Return to invoice Cover and without it explained with example.

#RTI #returntoinvoicecover #rtiincarinsurance
tags: Return to invoice vs zero depreciation
Best Car Insurance policy in India 2018

comments.text:
one question, car price 10lakhs (say) and suppose the insurance premium amount is 14k including RTI and IDV value of 6lakhs. but if we decrease the IDV to 4lakhs, the premium amount too decrease. In that case, will RTI cover the whole amount (approx) of the car at the time of purchase or will affect the amount.
in simple words, do IDV matters if we take the RTI addon as you said that RTI fill the gap between the IDV and the price of the car. in the above two cases, will the RTI fill the gap of 6lakhs in case of IDV 4 lakhs and 4lakhs in case of IDV 6lakhs?
